bird.summary: The masked saltator (Saltator cinctus) is a species of passerine bird in the tanager family Thraupidae. It is found in southern Colombia, E…

relations.subject: Masked saltator
relations.evidence: Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests, where it is threatened by habitat loss
